name: DevelopmentCats
html:
dev@cat-machine:~
dev@cat-machine:~/projects$▌
const dev = "DevelopmentCats";
while(true) // purr
ship("code");
Meow-Driven Development
css: .dc-card{width:100%;height:100%;background:#0d1117;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Courier New',Courier,monospace;box-sizing:border-box;padding:4%}.dc-terminal{width:100%;max-width:340px;background:#161b22;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #30363d;box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(88,166,255,0.15),0 0 2px #58a6ff;overflow:hidden}.dc-terminal-bar{background:#21262d;padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border-bottom:1px solid #30363d}.dc-dot{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block}.dc-red{background:#ff5f57}.dc-yellow{background:#febc2e}.dc-green{background:#28c840}.dc-title{color:#8b949e;font-size:clamp(9px,1.8vw,12px);margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}.dc-body{padding:clamp(8px,3%,18px)}.dc-cat{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;margin-bottom:clamp(4px,2%,10px)}.dc-cat-ears{display:flex;gap:clamp(14px,5%,26px);margin-bottom:-2px}.dc-ear{width:0;height:0;border-left:9px solid transparent;border-right:9px solid transparent;border-bottom:14px solid #f9826c;display:inline-block}.dc-cat-face{background:#f9826c;border-radius:50%;width:clamp(36px,12%,52px);height:clamp(36px,12%,52px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:2px;position:relative;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(249,130,108,0.5)}.dc-eye{width:6px;height:6px;background:#0d1117;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;animation:dc-blink 3.5s infinite}.dc-eye-left,.dc-eye-right{position:relative}.dc-eye-left{margin-right:6px}.dc-eye-right{margin-left:6px}@keyframes dc-blink{0%,90%,100%{transform:scaleY(1)}95%{transform:scaleY(0.1)}}.dc-nose{width:5px;height:4px;background:#c0392b;border-radius:50%}.dc-whiskers{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:2px}.dc-wl,.dc-wr{width:18px;height:1px;background:rgba(13,17,23,0.5)}.dc-prompt{margin:clamp(4px,2%,8px) 0 clamp(2px,1%,4px) 0;font-size:clamp(9px,2vw,13px)}.dc-user{color:#58a6ff}.dc-sep{color:#8b949e}.dc-path{color:#3fb950}.dc-dollar{color:#e3b341;margin-left:4px}.dc-cursor{color:#58a6ff;animation:dc-blink-cur 1s steps(1) infinite}@keyframes dc-blink-cur{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}.dc-code{font-size:clamp(8px,1.9vw,12px);line-height:1.6;color:#c9d1d9}.dc-indent{padding-left:1.4em}.dc-kw{color:#ff7b72}.dc-var{color:#ffa657}.dc-op{color:#79c0ff}.dc-str{color:#a5d6ff}.dc-sc{color:#c9d1d9}.dc-fn{color:#d2a8ff}.dc-paren{color:#c9d1d9}.dc-bool{color:#79c0ff}.dc-comment{color:#8b949e;font-style:italic}.dc-tagline{margin-top:clamp(6px,2.5%,12px);text-align:center;color:#58a6ff;font-size:clamp(9px,2vw,13px);letter-spacing:0.04em;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(88,166,255,0.6);animation:dc-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes dc-glow{from{text-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(88,166,255,0.4)}to{text-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(88,166,255,0.9),0 0 2px #58a6ff}}
